name: Boston Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
3. Add the eggs to the mixture and mix well.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, stirring until just combined.
6. Fold in the chopped walnuts and raisins.
7. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a lined cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly golden.
